content:
# Global Securities Settlement — Markets SSI All settlement instructions are maintained by the Global Custody & Settlements desk. The DEC/RECU BIC identifies the global custodian acting as Delivering or Receiving Custodian (:95P::DECU/:95P::RECU in MT54x). The Local Settlement Agent BIC identifies the sub-custodian or depository participant at the place of settlement (:95P::DEAG/:95P::REAG). Account numbers are the custodian's safe-custody account at the Local Settlement Agent unless otherwise noted. Institution BIC is the PSET (Place of Settlement) — the central depository or ICSD where the trade settles (:95P::PSET). For cross-ICSD trades the method suffix indicates the settlement venue: CLEARGER = Clearstream Germany (DAKVDEFF), EUROCLEAR = Euroclear Belgium (MGTCBEBE), CLEARSTR = Clearstream Luxembourg (CEDELULL). ## Clearstream Germany (CLEARGER) Settlement at Clearstream Banking AG, Frankfurt (DAKVDEFF). Used for German domestic bonds, Austrian and Italian cross-border eurobonds, and Dutch government securities settling in the Frankfurt system.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
Germany-CLEARGERGermanyGOVT/CORPDAKVDEFFCHASDEFXDE89370400440532013001DEUTDEFF1234567CBF member account required. Use BIC DAKVDEFF as PSET in MT541/543.
Italy-CLEARGERItalyGOVT/CORPDAKVDEFFUBSWDEFFDE47370400440532013000DEUTDEFF9876543Italian government bonds (BTPs) eligible for cross-border settlement at Clearstream Germany. Pre-matching required by 15:00 CET.
Austria-CLEARGERAustriaGOVT/CORPDAKVDEFFRZOOAT2LDE23370400440532013002BAWAATWW3456789Austrian government bonds settle at CBF via bridge link. OeKB holds the depository account.
Netherlands-CLEARGERNetherlandsGOVTDAKVDEFFINGBDEFFDE12370400440532013003DEUTDEFF2345678Dutch DSL (Staatsleningen) settling in Frankfurt. PSET confirmed with counterparty pre-trade.
## Euroclear Belgium (EUROCLEAR) Settlement at Euroclear Bank SA/NV, Brussels (MGTCBEBE). Used for French OATs, Belgian OLOs, Italian BTPs cross-ICSD, and Eurobond market instruments with XS ISINs.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
France-EUROCLEARFranceGOVT/CORPMGTCBEBEBNPAFRPPBE68539007547034AGRIFRPP30002005000001French OATs settle natively at Euroclear France (SICVFRPP) but cross-border via Euroclear Bank. Specify MGTCBEBE as PSET for all cross-border OAT trades.
Belgium-EUROCLEARBelgiumGOVT/CORPMGTCBEBEGEBABEBBBE45096000000008BNAGBEBB40011801Belgian OLOs (linear bonds) settle domestically at NBB-SSS (NBBEBEBB). Use MGTCBEBE for cross-border only.
Italy-EUROCLEARItalyGOVT/CORPMGTCBEBEBNPAFRPPBE71096000000080BBRUBEBB50021701BTPs via Euroclear Bank. Pre-matching deadline 16:00 CET. Monte Titoli link active for domestic DvP.
Netherlands-EUROCLEARNetherlandsGOVT/CORPMGTCBEBEINGBDEFFBE12096000000090ABNANL2A60031802Dutch bonds via Euroclear Bank ICSD. Alternatively settle at Euronext Securities Amsterdam (NECINL2A) for domestic trades.
## Euroclear France (LOCAL-EUROFR) Domestic settlement at Euroclear France SA, Paris (SICVFRPP). Used for French equities, OATs, and corporate bonds requiring domestic DvP in the ESES system.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
France-LOCALFranceEQTY/GOVT/CORPSICVFRPPPARBFRPPFR7630056009271234567890182BNPAFRPP30004000010001ESES domestic settlement. EGSP code preferred for agent identification. T+2 settlement cycle. SRD2 compliant.
## Clearstream Luxembourg (CLEARSTR) Settlement at Clearstream Banking S.A., Luxembourg (CEDELULL). Used for XS ISIN eurobonds, Luxembourg-domiciled funds, and cross-border positions not suitable for Euroclear Bank.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
Luxembourg-CLEARSTRLuxembourgCORP/FUNDCEDELULLCHASDEFXLU280019400644750000BCELLULL40001234Primary ICSD account. Clearstream ID required in lieu of BIC for participant identification per ICSD market practice.
Eurobond-CLEARSTRInternationalXS CORPCEDELULLUBSWDEFFLU470019400644750001BCELLULL40001235XS ISIN eurobonds. Bridge settlement available to Euroclear Bank (MGTCBEBE) for same-day positions. Clearstream ID is mandatory per ICSD practice.
## UK — CREST (LOCAL-CREST) Settlement at Euroclear UK & International Ltd, London (CRSTGB22). Used for UK equities (LSE-listed), gilts, and sterling corporate bonds in the CREST system.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
UK-CRESTUnited KingdomEQTY/GOVT/CORPCRSTGB22BARCGB22GB29LOYD60161331926819MIDLGB2212345678CREST member accounts mandatory. CREST participant ID required alongside BIC. T+2 settlement for equities, T+1 for gilts. Stamp duty reserve 0.5% on equity purchases.
## United States — DTC (LOCAL-DTC) Settlement at Depository Trust Company, New York (DTCYUS33). Used for US equities, corporate bonds, agency bonds, and money market instruments.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
US-DTCUnited StatesEQTY/CORP/MMKTDTCYUS33SBOSUS3X0901234IRVTUS3N0012345DTC participant ID is required by US market practice in lieu of BIC for settlement. ABA routing number 021000021 for wire legs. CNS netting applies for equity positions.
US-FEDWIREUnited StatesGOVTFRNYUS33SBOSUS3X021000021IRVTUS3N0012346US Treasuries and agency bonds settle at Fedwire Securities Service (FRNYUS33). ABA/routing number used; BIC accepted as alternative identifier.
## Japan — JASDEC (LOCAL-JASDEC) Settlement at Japan Securities Depository Center, Tokyo (JAESJPJT). Used for Japanese equities (TSE-listed), JGBs, and yen-denominated corporate bonds.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
Japan-JASDECJapanEQTY/CORPJAESJPJTBOTKJPJT1234567890SMBCJPJT0098765JASDEC participant code required. JGBs settle at BOJ-NET (BOJPJPJT) separate from equities. T+2 for equities. DVP settlement mandatory for all trades above JPY 50M.
## Spain — Iberclear (LOCAL-IBERCLEAR) Settlement at Sociedad de Gestion de los Sistemas de Registro, Compensacion y Liquidacion de Valores (Iberclear), Madrid (ESAEESBB). Used for Spanish equities (BME-listed), Bonos, and Letras del Tesoro.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
Spain-IBERCLEARSpainEQTY/GOVT/CORPESAEESBBBBVAESBBES9121000418401234567891CAIXESBBES6621000418401234567891Iberclear uses ARCO system for equities and CADE for fixed income. Entity ID (NIF) required alongside BIC. T+2 settlement. SMPG Spain market practice applies.
## Switzerland — SIX SIS (LOCAL-SIX) Settlement at SIX SIS Ltd, Zurich (INSECHZZ). Used for Swiss equities (SIX-listed), confederation bonds, and CHF-denominated corporate bonds.
MarketCountrySecurity TypeInstitution BICDEC/RECUAccount at Local AgentLocal Settlement AgentLocal Agent Account No.Notes
Switzerland-SIXSwitzerlandEQTY/GOVT/CORPINSECHZZUBSWCHZHCH5604835001234567800CRESCHZZCH9300762011623852957SIX SIS participant ID required. Swiss securities cleared via SIX x-clear (SIXBCHZZ). Foreign shares held in SECOM system require separate instruction set. T+2.
